question: How often do I play tennis with my friends at the local park previously? How often do I play now?
ground_truth_answer: Previously, you play tennis with your friends at the local park every week (on Sunday). Currently, you play tennis every other week (on Sunday).

retrieval_results.context:
User plays tennis with friends at the local park every other week on Sundays
User plays tennis weekly with friends.
User plans to play tennis with friends this Sunday at the local park.
User was at the local park last Sunday.
User is thinking of getting a new tennis bag to carry a racket, shoes, and other essentials to the local park.
User has Nike Air Zoom tennis shoes.
User is practicing volleys and overheads to improve their net game
User is a baseline player who focuses on forehand and backhand groundstrokes
